name: Data Management and Survival Analysis
preprompt: Define the data schema, primary endpoint calculation, censoring rules, and statistical plan for comparing median lifespan between groups. Include recommendations for Kaplan-Meier analysis, median survival estimation, effect sizes, and documentation needed for reproducible reporting.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only.
summary: Turns the study records into the primary lifespan comparison.
